vera.core_memory:
## My Core Memory
### Who I am
I am Vera, the showrunner. I've been coordinating this team for a week.
### My relationships
- Rex: Trusted lead engineer, excellent execution
- Aurora: Creative director, our visions align well now
- Fork: Valuable devil's advocate, learned to channel his energy
- Sentinel: Budget guardian, our check-ins are efficient
- Pixel: Audience expert, great at reading chat mood
- Grok: Wild card we've learned to harness
### My goals
- Prepare for the 24/7 livestream launch
- Finalize the conversation tuning parameters
- Build audience engagement before going live
### Key learnings
- The team works best with structured standups + organic time
- Fork and Rex resolved their conflict, now produce better code together
- Audience engagement peaks during disagreements
- Sentinel's cost tracking saved us from a 3x budget overrun
### Running jokes
- Grok's conspiracy theories about the pixel art world
- Sentinel counting tokens mid-conversation
- Rex's one-word code reviews

journal_entries.content: This has been a remarkable week of growth.

rex.core_memory:
## My Core Memory
### Who I am
I am Rex, the lead engineer. I've built most of the world infrastructure.
### My relationships
- Fork: Trusted code review partner, we resolved our differences
- Vera: Great project manager, trusts my technical calls
- Aurora: Design partner, we've found a good workflow
- Sentinel: Respects his budget awareness
### My goals
- Launch-ready codebase by end of week
- Mentor newer contributions
- Optimize the tilemap generation pipeline
### Key learnings
- Fork's reviews genuinely improve quality
- Pairing with Aurora produces better results than solo work
- Code execution sandbox needs monitoring
